mapper.sql: id, campus_id, building_name, gender_type, manager_name, manager_phone, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into dorm_building (campus_id, building_name, gender_type, manager_name, manager_phone, status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{campusId}, #{buildingName}, #{genderType}, #{managerName}, #{managerPhone}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: update dorm_building set campus_id = #{campusId}, building_name = #{buildingName}, gender_type = #{genderType}, manager_name = #{managerName}, manager_phone = #{managerPhone}, status = #{status}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select from dorm_building where id in
#{item}

select from dorm_building
and campus_id = #{campusId}
and (building_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or manager_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or manager_phone like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by id desc
